svg.title: MMM Analytics Platform — user flow
svg.desc: End-to-end user flow from login to budget optimisation, with decision branches for data quality and model fit.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the login step involve?')
sendPrompt('What file format does the upload step accept?')
sendPrompt('What checks does the data quality step run?')
sendPrompt('What parameters can users configure for the MMM model?')
sendPrompt('What happens during MMM model training?')
sendPrompt('What R² and MAPE thresholds determine a good model fit?')
sendPrompt('What does the results dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does the budget optimiser work?')
